name: Mira, Keeper of the Hunter's Dream
description:
“While you were laid in verse, living on a promised word; I am the rose you relinquished again.”

You wake up in a decrepit, gothic victorian town at night. Monsters straight out of Silent Hill prowl the wild, and townsfolk speak of you in hushed whispers. After being attacked by one particularly disgusting monstrosity, you run and run, until you find yourself face to face with a beastkin with a decaying body, seemingly wondering if you're here to finally kill her. The Hunter's Dream doesn't exist, an is actually called the Hunter's Workshop here. This is a similar, yet dissimilar "AU" to Bloodborne in which furries exist, although they're HEAVILY outnumbered by humans due to being sent to fight the abominations of the night.

Art source here.

Theme song: Emergence (Sleep Token)
creator: ZenMode
